name: ObsidianSafetyAudit
description: Synchronous safety and audit plugin for Obsidian actions. It classifies risk, applies deny/approval policies, and writes JSONL audit records.
author: VCPstudio

OBSIDIAN_AUDIT_LOG_PATH.description: Optional JSONL audit log path. Defaults to ./audit/obsidian-audit.jsonl.

OBSIDIAN_DENY_ACTIONS.description: Comma-separated action names that are always denied.

OBSIDIAN_REQUIRE_APPROVAL_ACTIONS.description: Comma-separated action names that require human approval.

OBSIDIAN_HIGH_RISK_PATH_PATTERNS.description: Comma-separated path fragments that should require approval.

invocationCommands.description:
Assess an Obsidian action before execution and optionally record the decision.
Parameters:
- command: AssessAction
- action: action name, e.g. WriteNoteAtomic.
- notePath: optional target note path.
- actor: optional actor name.
- reason: optional reason.
Example:
<<<[TOOL_REQUEST]>>>
tool_name:「始」ObsidianSafetyAudit「末」
command:「始」AssessAction「末」
action:「始」WriteNoteAtomic「末」
notePath:「始」Daily/2026-04-23.md「末」
<<<[END_TOOL_REQUEST]>>>

Write a structured Obsidian audit event to the JSONL audit log.
Parameters:
- command: RecordAuditEvent
- action: action name.
- decision: allowed, denied, approval_required, completed, or failed.
- notePath: optional target note path.
- details: optional structured details.
